channel.title: Backtracking on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Backtracking on yexca'Blog

item.title: Algorithm: n-Queens Problem (Backtracking)
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview Problem Description The n-Queens problem involves placing $n$ queens on an $n \times n$ chessboard such that no two queens attack each other. This means no two queens can be in the same row, same column, or on the same diagonal (following standard chess queen movement rules). Problem Analysis We can solve the n-Queens problem using the following approach: Place the $i$-th queen in the $i$-th row. Starting from the first …
